title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.170 - Deficiency in year participating member agencies withdraw to be prorated by the actuary
text:
103.170.  Deficiency in year participating member agencies withdraw to be prorated by the actuary. — If there is a deficiency in any year, participating member agencies withdrawing from the plan during that year will be assessed a prorated amount determined by the actuary.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 4 subsec. 12)
